children.heading: .—FIFO
children.label: a .—FIFO
children.text: Except as provided in subsection (b), an amount withdrawn from an account under this chapter shall be treated as withdrawn on a first-in-first-out basis.
a nonqualified withdrawal for research, development, and design expenses incident to new and advanced vessel design, machinery, and equipment; or
an amount treated as a nonqualified withdrawal under .section 53510(d) of this title
